name: Tripp Lite AVR Series 750VA 450W Line-Interactive UPS System - 9 Hour Recharge - 3 Minute Stand-by - 120 V AC Input - 110 V AC, 115 V AC, 120 V AC Output - Single Phase - USB - 12 x NEMA 5-15R - 6 x Battery/Surge Outlet (AVR750U)
shortName: Tripp Lite AVR Series 750VA 450W Line-Interactive UPS System - 9 Hour
description: A 750VA line-interactive AVR UPS with extended recharge time and 12 outlets for comprehensive office power protection.
